name: PolyClawster Agent
description: Non-custodial Polymarket prediction market trading agent for OpenClaw. Supports setup, browse, trade, balance, auto-trading, and sell operations. Private key never transmitted — EIP-712 signing happens locally. Demo mode for safe onboarding. 153 downloads.
review: PolyClawster Agent is technically impressive — the non-custodial architecture is correctly implemented, code quality is above catalog average, and documentation is excellent. It's the first financial trading / prediction market skill in the catalog (Uniqueness 9/10). The conditional is warranted due to: all live trades routing through the author's relay server (polyclawster.com) for geo-bypass purposes, creating a centralized trust point, and the geo-bypass may violate Polymarket's ToS in restricted regions.
notes: CONDITIONAL LISTING — ⚠️ Financial Skill with Third-party Relay. (1) All live trades route through author-operated relay at polyclawster.com for geo-bypass. Users accept a trust dependency on this third-party server. (2) Geo-bypass may violate Polymarket Terms of Service in restricted regions — verify legality in your jurisdiction. (3) Prediction market trading carries inherent financial risk. Use demo mode first. (4) SKILL.md must add relay/ToS disclaimer (required per Gamora conditional). (5) OpenClaw metadata must declare network permissions: polyclawster.com and polygon-rpc.com. Listing published with conditions per score 7.4/10 ≥ 6.5 threshold. See GitHub Issue #295.

rocket_findings.note: No moderation flags on ClawHub; GitHub repo al1enjesus/polyclawster confirmed
